title: Feature-flag inventory
description: PLAN.md §124, §270–276. Every flag with its evaluation mechanism; a single React-side evaluator (hook + provider) must reproduce all three, and parity tests must cover the same on/off decisions Angular makes.

key.description: Flag identifier as used in the Angular source.

mechanism.description: enable-disable: simple on/off. cohort: per-user membership. tenant-rule: rules keyed on tenant UUID.

segment.description: Named segment/expression that resolves the membership.

tenantRule.description: Required when mechanism = 'tenant-rule'. Rules keyed on tenant UUID.

onForTenants.description: Tenant UUIDs for which the flag is on.

expression.description: Optional rule expression over tenant attributes.

consumers.description: Pages/components that read this flag (drives migration-unit dependency edges).

parityScenarioId.description: Behavior-oracle scenario that asserts the same on/off decision (track A link).
